items.title: Project Boneyard: New Coyle Map, and so much more! Coming July 14th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, While Dr. Easterman believes control comes through reward, Coyle knows it's earned through devotion! Project Boneyard will introduce a brand-new Trial environment, The Prison Farm , and brings back Sergeant Leland Coyle
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

While Dr. Easterman believes control comes through reward, Coyle knows it's earned through devotion! Project Boneyard will introduce a brand-new Trial environment, The Prison Farm, and brings back Sergeant Leland Coyle in the new Trial, "Locksock the Warden." The update will also add two new MK-Challenges, "Bribe the Judges" and "Cancel the Broadcast," plus the Blood Drive event featuring new Trial machinery and the terrifying new enemy, The Biter, prowling the new maps. Alongside the new content, players can enjoy major quality-of-life additions like Rig and Knife Customization, Loadout Presets, Mastery Tasks, and extensive reworks to both Escalation and Invasion.

The Season 7: Project Boneyard update will be released July 14, 2026 10:00am ET.

New Trial Environment: Prison Farm

Reagents will bring "cruel and unusual" back to the living conditions of the prison population until riot makes way for revenge, while avoiding the latest member of our experimental population: The Biter.

New Trial: LOCKSOCK THE WARDEN

You are freedom. The indefinable promise that keeps prisoners at the grindstone that turns authority to profit and back again. Don't let false authority stand in the way of real capital. Kill the Warden, and we will let you out. 

New Ex-Pop: THE BITER

This update introduces Reagents to our newest member of the experimental population, The Biter. These psycho-sadists, former forced labor inmates incapacitated through acts of self-mutilation as protest, have been physically repaired and mentally destroyed by Murkoff’s doctors and scientists.

This new Ex-Pop will be featured in Prison Farm, and the 2 new MK-Challenges released during Project Boneyard.

New MK-Challenge: BRIBE THE JUDGES

You are the master, whose property is the purpose of the law. Salary reminds enforcement that their monopoly of violence only exists for your monopoly of capital. Collect the bribes, pay the judges, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: CANCEL THE BROADCAST

You are the butcher, who reminds the sheep the ultimate path of all flesh, no matter the bounty of wealth or the wealth of spirit. Sabotage the broadcast, defile the faithful with blood, and we will let you out. 

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT BONEYARD

The new Deluxe Catalog “Project Boneyard” will be available. The catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items, unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins other Deluxe Catalogs or purchasable in the Murkoff Store.

Blood Drive Community Event

Blood Drive is a community-wide event that will start on July 14th and last until August 25th. Murkoff will require a substantial supply of blood for an upcoming project, and every contribution helps advance the collective goal. As the community reaches new milestones, rewards will be unlocked for all participating Reagents. Keep an eye out for Murkoff Memorandums on our social media channels!

Invasion 2.0

Invasion is getting a major rework, more details about this will be provided in the full Patch Notes on July 14th.

  • Major Imposter balancing pass

    [/*]

  • Major Reagent balancing pass

    [/*]

  • New Imposter Loadout (Gadgets)

    [/*]

  • New Struggle Minigame

    [/*]

  • New Imposter Night Vision

    [/*]

  • Invasion Maps changes

    [/*]

  • Invasion Matchmaking rules

    [/*]

  • Cross-team communication

    [/*]

  • All Amps now work in Invasion

    [/*]

  • New Invasion Season Reset with new Gold 1 Legendary Outfit Reward

    [/*]

Invader Loadout

Imposters now have their own loadout to select gadgets that requires level 30 (when Invasion unlocks)

  • MIMIC - Assume the appearance of a Reagent. Become quieter while moving and preparing a Stab. Hold the fake item to blend in and remain concealed from pings.

    [/*]

  • NEUROSHOCK - Projectile that briefly disrupts a Reagent and disables their rig.

    [/*]

  • STIM - Inject a powerful stimulant to temporarily increase speed, stamina, and gain projectile immunity.

    [/*]

  • STEEL TRAP - Deploy a trap that briefly immobilizes any Reagent caught in it.

    [/*]

  • MOTION SENSOR - Deployable device that detects nearby Reagent movement within range.

    [/*]

  • EX-POP BAIT - Throw to lure an Ex-Pop to patrol the impact area.

    [/*]

Escalation 2.0

As the therapy continues to evolve, we have reworked Escalation. Starting on July 14th at 10am ET at the release of Project Boneyard, all Escalation save game peaks will be reset to make way for Escalation 2.0 and the features being introduced.

  • New Weekly Escalations (Thematics)

    [/*]

  • Escalation Leaderboards

    [/*]

  • Endless Escalation refresh (reset Savegames)

    [/*]

  • Savegame management changes

    [/*]

  • Matchmaking/Group Finder changes

    [/*]

  • Revamped Escalation UI

    [/*]

Other Features Coming in Project Boneyard

This seasonal update will aslo feature some quality-of-life changes to help Reagents enjoy their Therapy!

  • New Blackmarket Outfits

    [/*]

  • New Loadout Presets: for both Reagents and Imposters roles

    [/*]

  • New Knife & Rig Customizations

    [/*]

  • New Mastery Tasks: for those wanting to master their Rigs and Knife play

    [/*]

  • New Hint System: for those seeking a little extra direction in Trials

    [/*]

Twitch Drops Special Event

Watch any The Outlast Trials stream to acquire our Project Boneyard Twitch Drops! Check out our FAQ to learn more about how to link your game to Twitch and how you will be able to earn exclusive rewards by watching any content creators play The Outlast Trials on Twitch!

We will see you all in the Sleep Room very soon Reagents...

The RB Team

items.title: The Outlast Trials Critic Reviews
items.summary: The Outlast Trials has been reviewed by 66 critics and currently has a
items.content:
The Outlast Trials is a bloody cooperative horror game that burns brightly, but fizzles after a few enjoyable hours.

The Outlast Trials is a fun, but flawed addition to the Outlast series, trading in the original titles’ claustrophobic horror for in-your-face multiplayer mayhem. The title’s core gameplay loop offers a thrilling challenge and high replayability, delivering plenty of trials for fans to sink their teeth into across its Core, Advanced, and Ultra Programs, with immersive audio-visual elements that deliver on all fronts. Unfortunately, The Outlast Trials' balancing issues, unjustified gratuity, and complete lack of scares may leave some players disappointed. Fans of the Outlast series will likely find plenty of reasons to explore and overcome the Murkoff Corporation’s various testing facilities, as the title offers enough challenge to keep them engaged. However, for general horror audiences, and those new to Outlast, The Outlast Trials may struggle to live up to the legendary reputation of the series’ original entries.

The Outlast Trials is excessive and frantically enjoyable - but can occasionally tip over into frustration more than fear.

The Outlast Trials is a unique cooperative horror game with a lot of potential, but it's one of those early access games that's unpolished and lacking content.

Every trial feels like you're just scraping by.

Red Barrels' third Outlast game is a departure in many ways, but remains memorable for its twisted villains and the grotesque world they inhabit.

A huge part of me believes that The Outlast Trials - with a little more seamlessness between trials and objectives that aren’t rehashed and repeated - could’ve made an amazing single-player game, with multiplayer as an option. Though even with my qualms, The Outlast Trials is ultimately a game I’ve had a lot of fun with where there’s absolutely no compromise on quality, and Red Barrels should be applauded for that. It has been packed, shipped, and delivered with the utmost attentiveness from its developer. It’s just a shame that when it comes to the replayability of the game, it’s something I’ll likely revisit on occasion with friends as I would Phasmophobia or Lethal Company, and not much more than that.

The Outlast Trials is in better shape now it's out of Early Access, and while AI and fixes have been made, it's still light on content.

The Outlast Trials is possibly the most deranged the series has ever been, with plenty of smart ideas albeit quite sparse on content.

The Outlast Trials seeks to bring a world designed so far for a single player to the multiplayer terrain. The result? A delicious survival game that, while unfair to the bravest, offers hours and hours of fun to any group that has enough stomach to face their terrifying figures and buckets of blood and viscera.

Red Barrels expands the Outlast universe with a new entry that introduces a whole new set of dangerous experiments by the Murkoff Corporation, a series of threats that the players will have to deal with in order to thwart a worldwide mind control scheme. The Outlast Trials has the potential to be the best horror game we get in 2024, a experience that you'll be able to enjoy either on your own or alongside other players.

A good multiplayer experience, which still needs some refinement and which goes a little too far in penalizing solo players.

It's one of the most extreme and hardcore multiplayer experiences we've ever had, but at the same time catching its madness and overcoming its challenges is very, very satisfying. It's not for the faint of heart, of course.

As a player, a lot of what’s on the table with The Outlast Trials ain’t for me. The prospect of time investment for a survival horror-style game combined with the Fortnite-style game loop makes my brain hurt. But I understand why it works for the folks who are down, and looking at those sickos having a great time in the Early Access version is a vicarious sort of fun you can have from the critic’s position. I don’t enjoy it, but I “get” it, and being able to see the enjoyment elsewhere helps wrap my head around the game holistically and fill in the blanks. I open this window into my brain for y’all to help explain why a game I won’t be picking back up again still gets a good score!

items.title: The Outlast Trials – Season 7: Project Boneyard Launches on July 14
items.summary: The Outlast Trials will launch Season 7: Project Boneyard on July 14, as Sergeant Leland Coyle makes a return with his own sense of justice.
items.content:
Posted in: Games , Video Games | Tagged: red barrels , The Outlast Trials

The Outlast Trials will launch Season 7: Project Boneyard on July 14, as Sergeant Leland Coyle makes a return with his own sense of justice.

Developer and publisher Red Barrels have revealed new details for the next season of content for The Outlast Trials , as Season 7: Project Boneyard will arrive on July 14. A new, brutal Trial environment known as the Sinyala Facility will be added to the game, as Sergeant Leland Coyle returns to bring his own brand of justice. You'll also see two fresh MK-Challenges, several major updates to Escalation and Invasion, a few new customization features added to the mix, and a new Ex-Pop enemy being added to the Prison Farm called "The Biter." We have more details about it all below, along with the latest trailer.

In Project Boneyard, Reagents are sent into Murkoff's latest correctional nightmare, where authority is currency, punishment is policy, and freedom is the indefinable promise that keeps prisoners at the grindstone. At the center of it all stands Sergeant Coyle, returning in a prominent new role for the season's new Trial, Locksock the Warden.

The American prison is a meat grinder, taking in sociopaths and criminals and extruding functioning members of society. But strict routine, severe conditioning, and close quarters create a crucible for power dynamics built on violence, contraband, and flesh. Turn yourself in and suffer rehabilitation.

You are free. The indefinable promise that keeps prisoners at the grindstone that turns authority to profit and back again. Don't let false authority stand in the way of real capital. Kill the Warden, and we will let you out.

Project Boneyard introduces The Biter, a new Ex-Pop enemy stalking the Prison Farm. Arms removed to prevent further self-harm. Biters are universal sadists, still capable of grievous harm with their mechanically enforced jaws. Though Biters are kept chained by the neck for safety, Reagents should approach with caution, as their augmented legs gift them with unexpected velocity.

For those observing the chaos from a safer distance, additional rewards await. From July 14 to Aug 11, tune in to participating The Outlast Trials Twitch streams to earn rewards through our latest Twitch Drops campaign. Visit the FAQ for full details on how to participate and unlock the rewards.

Project Boneyard also introduces a range of new features and improvements designed to expand player expression, streamline preparation, and improve the overall experience across key modes. Season 7 will introduce Rig Customization, Knife Customization, Loadout Presets, and Mastery Tasks, giving Reagents new ways to prepare for therapy and personalize their approach before entering the Trials. The update will also bring major reworks to both Escalation and Invasion, with significant changes designed to improve the flow, structure, and overall player experience of both modes.

items.title: The Outlast Trials: Season 7 Is Sending You to Prison
items.summary: Sergeant Coyle is back in The Outlast Trials Season 7, and he's brought an armless, jaw-augmented enemy chained by the neck to enforce order.
items.content:
Red Barrels By Linda Güster Published Jul 9, 2026, 10:00 AM EDT Linda Güster is a Contributor at DualShockers and a German, UK-based gaming journalist specializing in video games, esports, industry analysis, features, lists, reviews, interviews, and news. She has been writing professionally since 2020 and began covering video games and esports in 2025, turning a lifelong passion into her professional focus.

Before joining DualShockers, Linda worked as content lead for Esports Insider DACH and The Escapist Magazine Germany . She previously worked in software engineering and digital media, giving her a strong technical background and the ability to explain complex systems clearly. Across her career, she has written thousands of news pieces and covered gaming culture, esports, technology, and broader industry developments.

Generate a summary of this story follow Follow followed Followed Like Like Thread Log in Here is a fact-based summary of the story contents: Try something different: Show me the facts Explain it like I’m 5 Give me a lighthearted recap Red Barrels has announced Season 7 for The Outlast Trials . Project Boneyard launches July 14th, free for current owners on PC, Xbox , and PlayStation , and it is bringing a new Trial environment, two new MK-Challenges and a returning antagonist. It also brings what is easily the most unsettling new enemy the game has introduced to date. We'll get to that in just a moment.

Armwrestling, interior design, and brainwashing loudspeaker announcements make your stay at the Murkhoff Institute a memorable one.

Sergeant Leland Coyle is back. The returning antagonist takes a prominent new role in the season's main Trial , Locksock the Warden, set inside the Prison Farm – a new environment built around Murkoff's prison-industrial logic, where "authority is currency, punishment is policy, and freedom is the indefinable promise that keeps prisoners at the grindstone." Red Barrels writes this game's lore with a specific kind of institutional dread that never quite lets you get comfortable, and the Prison Farm setting leans directly into that.

Red Barrels Its arms removed to prevent further self-harm. Mechanically enforced jaws. Chained by the neck for safety. Augmented legs that give it unexpected velocity.

That is The Biter, Project Boneyard's new Ex-Pop, and it is genuinely one of the more disturbing enemy concepts the game has produced. The specific horror of a creature that has been disarmed and restrained specifically because the alternative was somehow worse – and is still dangerous enough to warrant all of that – is exactly the kind of body horror The Outlast Trials does well. The augmented legs are the kicker, because of course an enemy that's chained at the neck and has no arms would also be faster than you expect. That's just how this game works.

It also brings what is easily the most unsettling new enemy the game has introduced to date.

The Biter stalks the Prison Farm, and how exactly chained enemies operate within the Trial space is something we'll find out properly on July 14th. Given the game's track record with enemy design, any assumption that the chain makes them less threatening is probably naive.

Red Barrels 'Locksock the Warden' is the main Trial for the season , framed around the usual Murkoff logic of "kill this person, and we'll let you out." Two new MK-Challenges are brought in alongside it. 'Bribe the Judges' sends you to collect bribes and pay off judges – the flavour text around the "monopoly of violence existing for the monopoly of capital" is the kind of thing that would read as heavy-handed in another game and somehow feels right here. 'Cancel the Broadcast' is the other challenge, involving sabotaging a broadcast and defiling "the faithful with blood," which is Red Barrels' elegant way of describing what is probably an objective with enemies everywhere.

Red Barrels Project Boneyard also introduces a meaningful batch of new features. Rig Customization and Knife Customization expand how players can personalize their loadout. Loadout Presets let you save configurations ahead of entering Trials, which is a genuine quality-of-life addition for anyone who has been manually swapping builds between runs. Mastery Tasks add a new layer of progression goals for players who want something to work toward beyond the main Trial content.

Escalation and Invasion are both getting major reworks, though the full details of those changes are being held back until closer to launch. Both modes have been part of the game's core since earlier seasons, and significant structural changes to either one will matter a lot for how the endgame population plays it. Red Barrels has said the reworks are aimed at improving flow and overall player experience, which is the right direction of travel regardless of the specifics.

Twitch Drops are running from July 14th through to August 11th for anyone wanting to earn rewards without going directly into the chaos themselves. The Outlast Trials has been building its seasonal content steadily since launch, and Project Boneyard looks like one of the more substantial drops in a while. The Prison Farm environment opens up new design space, Sergeant Coyle returning gives the season a proper antagonist with established weight, and The Biter is the kind of enemy addition that will be showing up in horror gaming discussions for a while once people actually encounter it.

Nothing brings friends together like being chased by a naked giant and a leatherclad cop.

items.title: The Outlast Trials - Official Season 7: Project Boneyard Cinematic Trailer
items.summary: A prison riot in progress? Not under his eyes. Watch The Outlast Trials Season 7: Project Boneyard cinematic trailer for the new season of the survival co-op horror game. Season 7 of The Outlast Trials features a new Trial, two new MK-Challenges, major updates to Escalation and Invasion, new customization features, and the new Ex-Pop enemy, known as The Biter. In Season 7: Project Boneyard, Reagents are thrown into a brutal new Trial environment as Sergeant Leland Coyle returns to bring order, punishment, and profit back to Sinyala Facility’s population. The Outlast Trials' Season 7: Project Boneyard begins on July 14 on PC, Xbox, and PlayStation.

items.title: New Update | Prime Time Limited-Time Event, 2 New MK-Challenges & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Prime Time has begun in The Outlast Trials ! Murkoff’s newest therapy pushes Reagents into a relentless psychological assault where propaganda, fanaticism, and chaos collide. Face the new Prime Roulette variator featurin
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Prime Time has begun in The Outlast Trials! Murkoff’s newest therapy pushes Reagents into a relentless psychological assault where propaganda, fanaticism, and chaos collide. Face the new Prime Roulette variator featuring multiple Prime Assets in a single Trial, destroy Murkoff’s defective televisions for bonus rewards, survive two new MK-Challenges, and unlock the exclusive Limited-Time Catalog.

This update includes

  • New Limited-Time Event: PRIME TIME

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Catalog: PRIME TIME

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: WIN THE TRUTH

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: INCINERATE THE RELIC

    [/*]

  • New Routine Therapies: CLASSIFIED & MIRROR

    [/*]

  • Various bug fixes and improvements.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: PRIME TIME

Prime Time Therapy prepares Reagents for a future dominated by contradictory cults of personality and clashing fundamentalist ideals. Participants can expect their psyche to face brutal and fundamental assault from both ends.

Variators:

  • PRIME ROULETTE - Multiple Prime Assets present in the Trial at the same time. Once a Prime Asset retires, a different one will come in - sustaining relentless pressure and escalating unpredictability throughout the session!

    [/*]

  • BREAK THE TELEVISION - Stop Murkoff’s propaganda and break all defective televisions for additional rewards.

    [/*]

  • EXTRA PRIME ASSET TRAPS - Extra Prime Asset traps in the Trial.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Catalog: PRIME TIME

  • A brand new Catalog is available for the duration of the Prime Time Limited-Time Event.

    [/*]

  • Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Catalog to unlock exclusive rewards.

    [/*]

  • Once the Prime Time Event concludes on June 16 at 10am ET, the Catalog will be removed and any unused Event Tokens will be forfeited. Be sure to spend your Prime Time Tokens before the end of the event.

    [/*]

New MK-Challenge: WIN THE TRUTH

You are the blind observer, who consumes screen-fed ignorance and swells with the genius of idiot artifice. Regurgitate the knowledge that brings suffering to the wise, win the game which only punishes the defeated, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: INCINERATE THE RELIC

You are the heretic and you are the zealot. Relics are the proof of an impossible gospel, the belief that makes whole the deservedly slaughtered lamb. Pay your way into heaven, incinerate the relic, and we will let you out.

New Routine Therapies

These new routine therapies will come after the Prime Time Event ends.

  • CLASSIFIED - Multiple secret variators have been added to your therapy. Adapt or die.

    • Taking place June 16th to June 30th

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • MIRROR - The trial perspective is altered to mislead the reagents.

    • Taking place June 30th to July 14th

      [/*]
    [/*]

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • The previously removed “Rare” cosmetic tier has been reintroduced under a new designation: Enhanced.

    [/*]

  • Variator “Classified”: Tutorials for randomly selected variators are no longer displayed at the start of a Trial.

    [/*]

  • Escape the Lies: Fixed an issue where the “Mandatory Secondary Objective” variator did not function as intended during this Trial.

    [/*]

  • Escape the Lies has been removed from Escalation since there is no Shuttle sequence to choose your loadout.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where bandages could be reused when cancelling its animation.

    [/*]

Invasion

  • Ex-Pops no longer react to imposters, unless directly obstructed.

    [/*]

  • Imposters are now invulnerable to other projectiles for a longer period of time after being hit by a projectile. Additional hits during this window trigger reduced reactions.

    [/*]

  • Imposter scoring penalty caused by projectiles is not affected while in the invulnerability period anymore.

    [/*]

  • Imposter deployment is no longer tied to the number of Reagents alive in the Trial. It’s still affected by the total amount of Reagents in the game (1-2 reagents = 1 imposter, 3-4 reagents = 2 imposters).

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where a Reagent could still be executed if the Impostor was interrupted by another Reagent bashing through a door.

    [/*]

If you encounter any issues in-game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a ticket to speak with our support team directly!

Catch you in the Sleep Room and enjoy the Therapy, Reagents!

- The RB Team

items.title: The Outlast Trials Prime Time Update Released as Patch 1.55/1.000.053
items.summary: The Outlast Trials Prime Time update is out on May 19 as download 1.55/1.000.053 on consoles. Expect a new LTM, improvements and more.
items.content:
Red Barrels has released the latest content drop for The Outlast Trials , and it’s called Prime Time . Players can expect new MK-Challenges, bug fixes, improvements and of course, a new limited-time event in Prime Time.

Console gamers will see this patch as The Outlast Trials update 1.55/1.000.053 , and this also includes new cosmetic items.

For the complete info on the new events and fixes, read on.

Prime Time Therapy prepares Reagents for a future dominated by contradictory cults of personality and clashing fundamentalist ideals. Participants can expect their psyche to face brutal and fundamental assault from both ends.

You are the blind observer, who consumes screen-fed ignorance and swells with the genius of idiot artifice. Regurgitate the knowledge that brings suffering to the wise, win the game which only punishes the defeated, and we will let you out.

You are the heretic and you are the zealot. Relics are the proof of an impossible gospel, the belief that makes whole the deservedly slaughtered lamb. Pay your way into heaven, incinerate the relic, and we will let you out.

These new routine therapies will come after the Prime Time Event ends.

Expect a hotfix or two to be released in the coming days for any bugs that surface from this content drop.

Stay connected to MP1st and the latest news by following us on Bluesky , X , Facebook , TikTok , YouTube , and Google News .

Father, gamer, games media vet, writer of words, killer of noobs.

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes | Project Judas - April 1st
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Our team has worked on a hotfix patch addressing the following issues that will be rolling out on all platforms: Fixed missing text on some customization items. [/*] Fixed an issue where ping could be abnormally high in
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Our team has worked on a hotfix patch addressing the following issues that will be rolling out on all platforms:

  • Fixed missing text on some customization items.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where ping could be abnormally high in certain regions (PS5).

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where the game could occasionally get stuck in a reconnection loop.

    [/*]

  • Removed the score penalty for Imposters when Reagents escape during an Invasion. (The note remains visible in the Murkoff report for reference.)

    [/*]

  • Removed the “Stay Together” variator from the allowed pool for the Trial “Escape the Lies” (Escalation / Trial Maker).

    [/*]

  • Fixed a rare issue where the game could crash when an Imposter joined or left an Invasion match.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where clues could be obstructed by pushable objects in the Trial “Silence the Idol”.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where players could lose a cassette when scrolling quickly through their inventory in the Trial “Silence the Idol”.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where cassettes did not display the correct icon when dropped in the Trial “Silence the Idol”.

    [/*]

  • Fixed various issues with the Barricade Rig.

    [/*]

Thank you to our dedicated Reagents for your feedback and reaching out to us about any in-game issues you are experiencing!

A reminder that if you encounter any issues in game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a /ticket to speak with our support team directly.

If you have any feedback to relay to the team about The Outlast Trials please fill out our General Feedback Survey at any time.

Also, if you played The Outlast Trials Season 5: Project Messiah and would like to give us your feedback on last Season, feel free to fill out our survey here!

Catch you in the Sleep Room!

The RB Team

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes | Project Judas - March 26th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, A hotfix patch is currently deploying that will address the following issues: Fixed an issue where the Berserker could spawn under the map in certain situations. [/*] Fixed an issue where Barricades could permanently blo
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

A hotfix patch is currently deploying that will address the following issues:

  • Fixed an issue where the Berserker could spawn under the map in certain situations.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Barricades could permanently block doorways if deployment was interrupted while an enemy was bashing them.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Barricades interruption cooldown was 10s instead of the intended 3s.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Barricades did not behave as intended with the Limited Rigs variator.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where X-Ray cooldown was incorrect in Psychosurgery difficulty.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where parts of Deluxe Outfits were visible in first person.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where the Healing Rig was not consumed if swapped with another Rig while in-use (Salvage Rigs variator).

    [/*]

We also wanted to address some things that were brought up since yesterday's launch.

  • The Project Judas update brought in a change to the Tinnitus filter found in your player settings, so if you feel like your audio is muffled in-game, please adjust that setting to your liking as it is now working as intended.

    [/*]

  • The \ Trial will remain in Genesis indefinitely!  

    [/*]

  • In order to give our Reagents a smooth start to their therapy, we have made it so that Invasions cannot happen in the new Trials: "Silence the Idol", "Solve the Murder", "REDACTED". Invasion will be re-enabled on these Trials in the future.

    [/*]

Thank you to everyone for your constant feedback and for reaching out to us with any in-game issues!

If you played The Outlast Trials Season 5: Project Messiah and would like to give us your feedback on it, feel free to fill out our survey here!

A reminder to our Reagents, if you encounter any issues in game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a /ticket to speak with our support team directly.

If you have any feedback to relay to the team about The Outlast Trials please fill out our General Feedback Survey at any time.

See you in the Sleep Room Reagents!

The RB Team

items.title: Project Judas Patch Notes | Season 6, New Environment, New MK-Challenges & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, It's time to adjust your Murkoff Television sets for the feature presentation: Project Judas . This Season, you will get to feast your eyes on the Kress Twins attempt at political takeover! Otto and Arora have prepared q
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

It's time to adjust your Murkoff Television sets for the feature presentation: Project Judas. This Season, you will get to feast your eyes on the Kress Twins attempt at political takeover! Otto and Arora have prepared quite the show for you all in their new Trial Environment the Television Studio. Enjoy new MK-Challenges, survive the Scavenger Limited-Time Event, test out Noakes' hard work on the X-Ray and Barricade Rig reworks, and climb the Invasion Leaderboard and more...

This update includes

  • Season 6: PROJECT JUDAS

    [/*]

  • New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

    [/*]

  • New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Event: SCAVENGER

    [/*]

  • X-Ray & Barricade Rig Rework

    [/*]

  • New Invasion Season Begins

    [/*]

  • Introducing Invasion Leaderboards

    [/*]

  • New Blackmarket Outfits

    [/*]

  • Twitch Drop Event

    [/*]

  • Other Additions, Improvements and Fixes

    [/*]

Season 6: PROJECT JUDAS

Project Judas sees the return of Otto & Arora Kress in a new Trial Environment, the Television Studio. The Kress Twins have meticulously groomed Bob Vanier, celebrity talking head and idol to the masses, to be their upcoming political candidate. Molded to their best interests, Vanier is about to announce his political run live on the air, unless Reagents are able to seat Murkoff’s own candidate instead.

New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

You are the electric eye, the ravenous panopticon that births and consumes with the same razor-toothed orifice. Tear, burn, and crush the face of false charisma, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

You are the fetishist, whose obsession with the totems of violence allows you to define more convenient truths. Find the evidence to condemn our chosen killer, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: \

There appears to be an issue with the Sleep Room Terminal. Reagents are asked to ignore any unconventional programs that may populate their screens. Disregard any mention of \. Therapy is the only way to real freedom.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

The new Deluxe Catalog Project Judas is now available.

  • This Catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items for your own self expression.

    [/*]

  • Unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins, earned by completing the Onboarding Catalog, other Deluxe Catalogs, or they can be purchased in the Murkoff In-Game Store.

    [/*]

  • Acquire Stamps by completing Trials and Tasks, then use the Stamps to obtain the Deluxe Catalog items.

    [/*]

  • As a reminder, the Deluxe Catalogs are available permanently. Unlock items at your own pace.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: SCAVENGER

Prepare for the \ collapse. Enter the Trials with nothing and salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from Reagent corpses. Collect discarded mechanical components and return them to drop boxes to be used for the \ of \.

Program Scavenger Variators:

  • Salvage Rigs: Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from deceased subjects throughout the Trial.

    [/*]

  • Broken Reagent: Reagents have no starting Rigs, no Prescription, no Amps, reduced Night Vision battery, and start injured.

    [/*]

  • Deliver the Components: Reagents are required to locate and deliver mechanical components to a salvage box.

    [/*]

Event Schedule:

  • Part 1 will take place from March 24, 2026 @ 10am ET - April 7, 2026 @ 9:59am ET

    [/*]

  • Part 2 will take place from April 7, 2026 @ 10am ET - April 21, 2026 @9:59am ET

    [/*]

X-Ray and Barricade Rigs Rework

Noakes has been busy collecting feedback on its creation, and has greatly improved both the X-Ray and Barricade Rigs.

X-RAY RIG

Developer Comment: X-Ray previously felt too passive, offering limited control due to its fixed duration. With this rework, we want Reagents to play a more active role in gathering and sharing intelligence.

X-Ray is now a toggle ability, allowing players to use it on demand. The ping system has been expanded, enabling multiple targets to be marked through walls, making it a powerful tool for team coordination.

Additionally, X-Ray now introduces a more tangible gameplay impact by temporarily disabling nearby traps, reinforcing its role as both a reconnaissance and support tool.

New Description: Tactical enhancement that allows vision through solid surfaces, revealing points of interest. Can be toggled on or off on demand.

Changes:

  • X-Ray is now a toggle ability (On/Off).

    [/*]

  • Charge depletes while active and replenishes slowly while inactive.

    [/*]

  • Cooldown/energy system functions similarly to Night Vision.

    [/*]

  • New upgrade PING THROUGH: “Ping enemies and objects through walls while X-Ray is active. Multiple pings can be active at once.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD: “Generates an electromagnetic field while X-Ray is active, preventing trap activation.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade FASTER RECHARGE: “Decreases X-Ray recovery time.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade INCREASED CAPACITY: “Increase X-Ray total capacity.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrades RESOURCES INTEL and CLASSIFIED INTEL have been merged and the upgrade is now called RECON: “X-Ray highlights nearby objectives, consumables, and high-priority items.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade SHARED INTEL has been removed.

    [/*]

BARRICADE RIG

Developer Comment: Barricade was previously too situational and difficult to use effectively due to its limitations. This rework introduces a charge-based system, allowing Reagents to carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded) and deploy them strategically to control space.

Barricades are now instantly refunded when removed by the player or a teammate, and their durability has been increased. They also damage enemies when broken, making them more impactful even when destroyed.

We’ve expanded deployment opportunities across Trials (including additional placements, rolling gates, windows, etc.), and added visual markers to guide players toward valid placement spots. This allows Reagents to quickly assess an area and make tactical decisions.

Finally, the cooldown now begins only after all Barricades are deployed, preserving the value of the Rig Rechargers while encouraging more active use of the ability.

New Description: Place barricades to block openings and delay pursuers. Carry 2 barricades. Removal instantly refunds them.

Changes:

  • Players now carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded).

    [/*]

  • Multiple barricades can be deployed at once (oldest breaks when placing a new one beyond the limit).

    [/*]

  • Barricades are instantly refunded if destroyed or removed by the player or a teammate.

    [/*]

  • Rig Cooldown starts only after all Barricades are placed.

    [/*]

  • Removing a Barricade during cooldown immediately stops the cooldown and refunds it.

    [/*]

  • Inventory UI updated to support multiple Barricades counter.

    [/*]

  • New HUD markers appear at location of valid Barricade deployment spots.

    [/*]

  • Enemies and Invaders now require more hits to break barricades.

    [/*]

  • Upgrade INCOMING WARNING has been revamped: “Enemy is automatically pinged and damaged upon breaking a barricaded door. Invaders are exhausted.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade FRIENDLY BREACH has been replaced by BREACH & RUSH: “Breaking a barricade grants an adrenaline boost (once every 60 seconds).”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade EXTRA BARRICADE now increases max Barricade carried to 3.

    [/*]

New Invasion Season Begins

The Invasion Rankings seasonal rewards have been refreshed. All players start from the start and must climb their way to Gold I to receive all new rewards.

Introducing Invasion Leaderboards

Show your Invasion skills to the world and climb the Seasonal Leaderboard. Access the new Leaderboard directly via the Invasion menu.

New Blackmarket Outfits

New Outfits have been delivered to the Murkoff Blackmarket In-Game Store! Once again, Reagents who purchase any Murkoff Coins for the first time during Season 6 will obtain the Desert Debris Outfit.

Twitch Drop Event

Reagents will be able to take advantage of an all new Twitch Drops campaign in celebration of the launch of Season 6: Project Judas! Watch The Outlast Trials streams to acquire exclusive Twitch Drop items from March 24th at 10am ET to April 21st at 9:59am ET. All streams of The Outlast Trials are eligible for Drops. Read more about how the Twitch Drops here.

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • Adjusted Scoring, Tasks and Achievements related to Barricade and X-Ray Rigs.

    [/*]

  • Adjusted Terminal Main Screen to show player icons and frames.

    [/*]

  • Added unique ping icon for Big Grunt enemy.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where stamina wouldn’t regenerate when an Imposter was attacked by an enemy while being exhausted.

    [/*]

  • Revisited rarities for cosmetics. They are now based on their source of acquisition. The new rarities are:

    • Standard - Trial Rewards, Therapy Levels, Badges, Standard Catalog.

      [/*]

    • Event - Events Rewards, Event Catalogs, Routine Therapies.

      [/*]

    • Deluxe - Deluxe Catalogs, Store, DLCs.

      [/*]

    • Classified - Genesis, Progression, Rebirth, Twitch Drops, etc.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Trial Maker:

    • Added variator “Nostophobia”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Salvage Rigs”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Broken Reagent”.

      [/*]

    • Added variator “Collect the Components”.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue with the Tinnitus Filter option not working correctly.

    [/*]

  • Various other bug fixes and improvements implemented.

    [/*]

We want to hear from YOU! If you played The Outlast Trials Season 5: Project Messiah and would like to give us your feedback on it, feel free to fill out our survey here!

A reminder to our Reagents, if you encounter any issues in game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a /ticket to speak with our support team directly.

If you have any feedback to relay to the team about The Outlast Trials please fill out our General Feedback Survey at any time.

See you in the Sleep Room Reagents!

The RB Team

items.title: The Outlast Trials: "Project Judas" details revealed - A new era of terror
items.summary: Explore Project Judas: Face the Kress Twins in the lethal TV Studio. Will you survive or fall to primal fear? Purchase The Outlast Trials now and run!
items.content:
On March 24, 2026, Murkoff Corporation will officially launch a massive experimental program titled "Project Judas." This Season 6 update not only adds fresh content but also redefines how players survive within the dark corridors of Outlast.

Set in an abandoned yet death-filled Television Studio, players will face off against a new duo of antagonists: The Kress Twins (Otto and Arora). This media-centric setting deeply echoes the horrific atmosphere of Outlast: Whistleblower and the intense pursuit sequences in Alan Wake 2 .

Unlike previous seasons, the Scavenger event will completely strip away the player's sense of security:

Red Barrels has implemented strategic changes to force players into more careful calculations:

X-Ray Enhancements (Enhanced Sight): The operational mechanic has shifted to a Toggle (On/Off) mode. When active, energy will deplete continuously. With this new upgrades, allow players not only to see enemies but also to "Tag" their locations for teammates through walls for a short duration and an ability to generate an Electromagnetic Pulse (EMP) helps neutralize electric traps or gas mines within a narrow radius around the player.

Barricade Upgrades (Versatile Guard): Increase the number of carryable planks to a maximum of 3 (after full upgrades). The cooldown mechanic has changed: If you proactively dismantle a barricade before it is destroyed by an enemy, the device will be refunded to your inventory for immediate reuse without waiting for a cooldown.

Project Judas Deluxe Catalog: A massive collection spanning 10 pages featuring a variety of new "traitor-themed" outfits, distorted character customization parts, and over 20 new cell decorations.

Seasonal Rank Reset: All Invasion ranking points will be reset. Players who achieved high ranks in the previous season will receive exclusive Badges and Cell Posters to honor their achievements.

"Project Judas" is more than just an update; it is a bold testament to the continuous evolution of psychological horror. With the debut of the Kress Twins and these heart-pounding survival challenges, there has never been a better time to step into the world of The Outlast Trials . Don't miss the chance to experience the most primal fear. Visit the game's official website for more details. Check out our site to purchase The Outlast Trials today and prepare for a journey with no escape this March 24th!

Having spent years as a 3D artist for games and animation, I’ve learned to see games as more than just polygons—they’re living stories. My real passion is diving deep into the worlds and narratives that make games so captivating. Now, I’m dedicated to sharing those unique insights and stories with fellow gamers through my writing.

items.title: The Outlast Trials will receive Project Judas with a new location.
items.summary: The Outlast Trials is getting the Project Judas update, featuring a new Television Studio location and additional challenges.
items.content:
Login without a password Sign In Forgot your password? Forgot your username? News GAMES The Outlast Trials will receive Project Judas with a new location. Evgen Kovalov GAMES March 20 2026 Views: 3688 Studio Red Barrels presented a cinematic trailer for the update Project Judas for The Outlast Trials , revealing the atmosphere and key elements of the new content. The video showcases a dark style and reinforces the project's signature psychological tension.

The main innovation will be a new location - Television Studio , where players must complete challenges in a controlled environment built around the theme of media and manipulation. The update expands the variety of missions and increases the pressure on players with new scenarios.

Release Project Judas takes place March 24, 2026 . A game The Outlast Trials available on PlayStation 4 , PlayStation 5 , Xbox One , Xbox Series X / S As well as PC (Steam and Epic Games Store) , continuing to receive regular updates.

items.title: Project Judas: New Kress Twins Map, and More Premiering March 24th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, The stage is set, and the cameras are rolling, let Anarchy reign. 🎥 The Kress Twins will return in a new Trial environment, the Television Studio, to exert their power on on the masses by installing a celebrity talking
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

The stage is set, and the cameras are rolling, let Anarchy reign. 🎥 The Kress Twins will return in a new Trial environment, the Television Studio, to exert their power on on the masses by installing a celebrity talking head as a political candidate. 📺 Meanwhile, turmoil brews within the Sinyala Facility... will control hold?

The Season 6: Project Judas update will go live March 24, 2026 10:00am ET and it will feature a new MK-Challenge, Scavenger Limited-Time Event, reworks to the X-Ray and Barricade Rigs, a new Invasion Rank Season and Leaderboard, as well as a few mysteries to discover when you enter the Facility...

New Trial Environment: Television Studio

The Kress Twins have spent years meticulously grooming Bob Vanier, a silver-tongued celebrity and idol to the masses, into their ideal political candidate. Molded to serve Murkoff's agenda, Vanier is moments away from announcing his candidacy, live on national television, unless Reagents can seat Murkoff's own candidate first.

New Trial: SILENCE THE IDOL

You are the electric eye, the ravenous panopticon that births and consumes with the same razor-toothed orifice. Tear, burn, and crush the face of false charisma, and we will let you out.

New Deluxe Catalog: PROJECT JUDAS

The new Deluxe Catalog “Project Judas” will be available. The catalog is filled with 10 pages of new exclusive cosmetic items, unlock the Deluxe Catalog using Murkoff Coins other Deluxe Catalogs or purchasable in the Murkoff Store.

New MK-Challenge: SOLVE THE MURDER

You are the fetishist, whose obsession with the totems of violence allows you to define more convenient truths. Find the evidence to condemn our chosen killer, and we will let you out.

Scavenger Limited-Time Event

Prepare for the \ collapse. Enter the Trials with nothing. Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from Reagent corpses. Collect discarded mechanical components and return them to drop boxes to be used for the \ of \.

Some questions are better left unanswered. For now...

Program Scavenger variators:

  • Salvage Rigs: Salvage unstable, single-use Rigs from deceased subjects throughout the Trial.

    [/*]

  • Broken Reagent: Reagents have no starting Rigs, no Prescription, no Amps, reduced Night Vision battery, and start injured.

    [/*]

  • Deliver the Components: Reagents are required to locate and deliver mechanical components to a salvage box.

    [/*]

Invasion Rank Refresh & Leaderboard Integration

As of March 24th at 10am ET the Invasion Rankings and seasonal rewards will be refreshed. All players will start fresh at the beginning of a Season and must climb their way to Gold 1 to receive all the new rewards.

Reagents will also be able to show off their Invasion skills to the world and climb the seasonal leaderboard. You will be able to access the global Leaderboard via the Invasion menu directly as shown in the above screenshot.

X-RAY and Barricade Rigs Rework

Here are the changes coming to the X-Ray Rig:

  • X-Ray is now a toggle ability (On/Off).

    [/*]

  • Charge depletes while active and replenishes slowly while inactive.

    [/*]

  • Cooldown/energy system functions similarly to Night Vision.

    [/*]

  • New upgrade PING THROUGH: “Ping enemies and objects through walls while X-Ray is active. Multiple pings can be active at once.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade ELECTROMAGNETIC FIELD: “Generates an electromagnetic field while X-Ray is active, preventing trap activation.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade FASTER RECHARGE: “Decreases X-Ray recovery time.”

    [/*]

  • New upgrade INCREASED CAPACITY: “Increase X-Ray total capacity.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrades RESOURCES INTEL and CLASSIFIED INTEL have been merged and the upgrade is now called RECON: “X-Ray highlights nearby objectives, consumables, and high-priority items.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade SHARED INTEL has been removed.

    [/*]

Here are the changes coming to the Barricade Rig:

  • Players now carry multiple Barricades (2 by default, 3 when upgraded).

    [/*]

  • Multiple barricades can be deployed at once (oldest breaks when placing a new one beyond the limit).

    [/*]

  • Barricades are instantly refunded if destroyed or removed by the player or a teammate.

    [/*]

  • Rig Cooldown starts only after all Barricades are placed.

    [/*]

  • Removing a Barricade during cooldown immediately stops the cooldown and refunds it.

    [/*]

  • Inventory UI updated to support multiple Barricades counter.

    [/*]

  • New HUD markers appear at location of valid Barricade deployment spots.

    [/*]

  • Enemies and Invaders now require more hits to break barricades.

    [/*]

  • Upgrade INCOMING WARNING has been revamped: “Enemy is automatically pinged and damaged upon breaking a barricaded door. Invaders are exhausted.”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade FRIENDLY BREACH has been replaced by BREACH & RUSH: “Breaking a barricade grants an adrenaline boost (once every 60 seconds).”

    [/*]

  • Upgrade EXTRA BARRICADE now increases max Barricade carried to 3.

    [/*]

Twitch Drops Special Event

Check out our FAQ to learn more about how to link your game to Twitch and how you will be able to earn exclusive rewards by watching any content creators play The Outlast Trials on Twitch!

Get The Outlast Trials Game & DLC Packs on Sale now as part of the Steam Spring Sale!

The Outlast Trials Merch Store Drop

A new merch collection for The Outlast Trials is available. 💉 Inspired by Project Messiah, this drop features new designs for those ready to showcase their Therapy level for the world to see!

🛒 Check out the Collection here

We can't wait to see you in the Sleep Room to celebrate the launch of Project Judas!

The RB Team

items.title: Hotfix Patch Notes | Advent of Bogomolova Feb. 17th
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, We have released a new hotfix patch to address the following issues: Fixed an issue where the Stun radius was bigger than intended in Invasion. [/*] Fixed an issue where two Prime Assets could spawn at the same time in O
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

We have released a new hotfix patch to address the following issues:

  • Fixed an issue where the Stun radius was bigger than intended in Invasion.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where two Prime Assets could spawn at the same time in Orphanage.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where News on title screen would crash the game in some rare situations.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Join-in-Progress toggle could be changed in Trial.

    [/*]

Feel free to join our official 18+ Outlast Discord Server and open a '/ticket' to speak directly with our support team about any issues you encounter in-game, and you can fill out our General Feedback Survey here.

We will see you in the Sleep Room! - The RB Team

items.title: New Update | Advent of Bogomolova Limited-Time Event, New MK-Challenges & more
items.summary: Greetings Reagents, Murkoff’s latest update ushers in the Advent of Bogomolova , a new Limited-Time Event that marks the arrival of Sister Liliya and the awakening of a dangerous new presence within the Sinyala Facility. As she lurks within
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

Murkoff’s latest update ushers in the Advent of Bogomolova, a new Limited-Time Event that marks the arrival of Sister Liliya and the awakening of a dangerous new presence within the Sinyala Facility. As she lurks within select Trials, Reagents will face new variators, exclusive rewards, and fresh challenges designed to test obedience and resolve. This update also celebrates The Outlast Trials’ 2 year Anniversary, introduces new MK-Challenges and later, new Routine Therapies, restores the Join-in-Progress feature, and delivers a range of fixes and improvements.

This update includes

  • New Limited-Time Event: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

    [/*]

  • New Limited-Time Catalog: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: ELIMINATE THE LEGACY

    [/*]

  • New MK-Challenge: FLATTEN THE FOREMAN

    [/*]

  • New Routine Therapies: DEADLOCK & BURNOUT

    [/*]

  • 2-Years Anniversary Tasks & Rewards

    [/*]

  • Return of the “Join Trials in Progress” feature

    [/*]

  • Various Bug Fixes and improvements

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Event: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

To welcome Liliya to the Sinyala facility, Murkoff has granted her audience with the other Prime Assets. For a limited time, Liliya will hide within the backdrop of selected Trials, waiting to pounce when you least expect it. God be with you, whether you want it or not.

Variators:

  • LILIYA BOGOMOLOVA - Liliya Bogomolova makes a special appearance in the Trial.

    [/*]

  • COLLECT THE AMULETS - Recover all the mannequin's amulets within the Trial. Fulfill the objective for additional rewards.

    [/*]

New Limited-Time Catalog: ADVENT OF BOGOMOLOVA

  • A brand new Catalog is available for the duration of the Advent of Bogomolova Limited-Time Event.

    [/*]

  • Players can spend their acquired Event Tokens in the Catalog to unlock exclusive rewards.

    [/*]

  • Once the Advent of Bogomolova Event concludes on March 10, the Catalog will be removed and any unused Event Tokens will be forfeited. Be sure to spend your Tokens before March 10.

    [/*]

New MK-Challenge: ELIMINATE THE LEGACY

Children born to wealth are the inbred bastards of greed and corruption, cheating at even the games for idiot children, drooling at the teat of avarice. Match the symbols, eliminate the legacy, and we will let you out.

New MK-Challenge: FLATTEN THE FOREMAN

Breach deeper into the factory where time brings new dangers. Opening emergency doors triggers lockdowns that enrage the Gooseberry, turning your escape into a tense race against time. Murkoff is teaching you sabotage and strategy, work smart, or suffer the consequences.

New Routine Therapies

Those new routine therapies will come after the time limited event.

  • DEADLOCK - SECURITY LOCKDOWN - The Trial is under full lockdown. You are issued two lockpicks to progress. Active surveillance cameras will administer shocks if detected.

    [/*]

  • BURNOUT - FIRE AND ICE PROTOCOL - Locate heat sources to maintain warmth - but extinguishing them is required to progress. Choose carefully.

    [/*]

In-Game Store Update

  • New FIRE HORSE Outfit available in the Blackmarket.

    [/*]

  • Event Catalog “DEEP BURN” is now available in the Catalogs Collection.

    [/*]

2-Years Anniversary Celebration

Join us as we celebrate 2 years since Murkoff officially welcomed all Reagents to start their therapy at the Sinyala Facility!

Receive exclusive rewards for The Outlast Trials' two years anniversary launch by completing a special set of tasks that are available to complete from February 10th to March 24th.

Join Trials in Progress

We are relaunching the Join-in-Progress feature, but now with more control.

  • Enable or Disable “Join-in-Progress” feature before launching any Trial (Group Leader only).

    [/*]

  • Decide whether or not you want to join trials in progress or groups in formation via the Group Finder Menu.

    [/*]

Additions/Fixes/Balancing

  • It is now possible to change the Trial difficulty, Invasion settings, and "Join in Progress" setting directly from the Trial Details menu. (as seen in above screenshot)

    [/*]

  • Fixed crash occurring with some AMD graphics card that have raytracing activated.

    [/*]

  • Therapies now have a minimum therapy level requirement:

    • Events: Therapy Level 5

      [/*]

    • Trial Maker: Therapy Level 10

      [/*]

    • Escalation: Therapy Level 15

      [/*]

    • Invasion: Therapy Level 30

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Trial Maker: Added new variators:

    • LELAND COYLE - Leland Coyle makes a special appearance in the Trial.

      [/*]

    • MOTHER GOOSEBERRY - Mother Gooseberry makes a special appearance in the Trial.

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • In-Game Store: Reworked the purchase confirmation modal for better clarity on transaction.

    [/*]

  • Invasion: Fixed an issue where the Ping input while in camera wasn’t working correctly on some controller layouts.

    [/*]

  • Invasion: Ping icon will now be removed when pinged Reagent uses a hidespot.

    [/*]

  • Tasks mentioning “enemies” now support the Invasion Imposters. (Ex: Throw projectiles on enemies.)

    [/*]

  • You can now use the Quick Communication wheels in the shuttle.

    [/*]

  • Other various bug fixes and improvements.

    [/*]

If you encounter any issues in-game, feel free to join our 18+ Official Outlast Discord Server and create a ticket to speak with our support team directly!

Catch you in the Sleep Room, Reagents!

- The RB Team

items.summary: Greetings Reagents, A new hotfix patch was released earlier today featuring the following fixes: Improved Imposter knife attack angles when engaging Reagents at close range. [/*] Fixed an issue where the Regroup button could trigger automat
items.content:
Greetings Reagents,

A new hotfix patch was released earlier today featuring the following fixes:

  • Improved Imposter knife attack angles when engaging Reagents at close range.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where the Regroup button could trigger automatically if a player was killed outside the Regroup Room while playing solo.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Imposters could cancel the end of the Slash animation to bypass its cooldown (again 🤞).

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Task exclamation mark icons could remain stuck on screen.

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where Reagents could become unable to complete a Trial after entering the SAS door while downed.

    [/*]

  • Various additional bug fixes and improvements.

    [/*]

Feel free to join our official 18+ Outlast Discord Server and open a '/ticket' to speak directly with our support team about any issues you encounter in-game.

You can also fill out our General Feedback Survey, or if you played the previous season, Project Diarchy, fill out our Season 4: Project Diarchy Player Sentiment Survey. For any information on our Twitch Drops and Account Linking please visit this page.

Catch you in the Sleep Room - The RB Team
